We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 4.43s, d = 125.83m:
t^2 = 4.43 * 4.43:
4.43 * 0.03 = 0.1329
4.43 * 0.40 = 1.7720
4.43 * 4.00 = 17.7200
0.1329 + 1.7720 = 1.9049
1.9049 + 17.7200 = 19.6249
k = 125.83 / 4.43^2 = 125.83 / 19.6249 = 125.830 / 19.624
= 0 + 1 * 125830 / 19624
= 1 + 1 * 106206 / 19624
= 2 + 1 * 86582 / 19624
= 3 + 1 * 66958 / 19624
= 4 + 1 * 47334 / 19624
= 5 + 1 * 27710 / 19624
= 6 + 1 * 8086 / 19624
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 80860 / 19624
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 61236 / 19624
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 41612 / 19624
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 21988 / 19624
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 2364 / 19624
= 6.40 + 0.01 * 23640 / 19624
= 6.41 + 0.01 * 4016 / 19624
= 6.410 + 0.001 * 40160 / 19624
= 6.411 + 0.001 * 20536 / 19624
= 6.412 + 0.001 * 912 / 19624
= 6.412

t = 3.17s, d = 64.43m:
t^2 = 3.17 * 3.17:
3.17 * 0.07 = 0.2219
3.17 * 0.10 = 0.3170
3.17 * 3.00 = 9.5100
0.2219 + 0.3170 = 0.5389
0.5389 + 9.5100 = 10.0489
k = 64.43 / 3.17^2 = 64.43 / 10.0489 = 64.430 / 10.048
= 0 + 1 * 64430 / 10048
= 1 + 1 * 54382 / 10048
= 2 + 1 * 44334 / 10048
= 3 + 1 * 34286 / 10048
= 4 + 1 * 24238 / 10048
= 5 + 1 * 14190 / 10048
= 6 + 1 * 4142 / 10048
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 41420 / 10048
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 31372 / 10048
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 21324 / 10048
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 11276 / 10048
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 1228 / 10048
= 6.40 + 0.01 * 12280 / 10048
= 6.41 + 0.01 * 2232 / 10048
= 6.410 + 0.001 * 22320 / 10048
= 6.411 + 0.001 * 12272 / 10048
= 6.412 + 0.001 * 2224 / 10048
= 6.412

t = 1.3s, d = 10.84m:
t^2 = 1.3 * 1.3:
1.3 * 0.3 = 0.39
1.3 * 1.0 = 1.30
0.39 + 1.30 = 1.69
k = 10.84 / 1.3^2 = 10.84 / 1.69 = 10.84 / 1.69
= 0 + 1 * 1084 / 169
= 1 + 1 * 915 / 169
= 2 + 1 * 746 / 169
= 3 + 1 * 577 / 169
= 4 + 1 * 408 / 169
= 5 + 1 * 239 / 169
= 6 + 1 * 70 / 169
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 700 / 169
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 531 / 169
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 362 / 169
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 193 / 169
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 24 / 169
= 6.40 + 0.01 * 240 / 169
= 6.41 + 0.01 * 71 / 169
= 6.410 + 0.001 * 710 / 169
= 6.411 + 0.001 * 541 / 169
= 6.412 + 0.001 * 372 / 169
= 6.413 + 0.001 * 203 / 169
= 6.414 + 0.001 * 34 / 169
= 6.414

t = 3.16s, d = 64.03m:
t^2 = 3.16 * 3.16:
3.16 * 0.06 = 0.1896
3.16 * 0.10 = 0.3160
3.16 * 3.00 = 9.4800
0.1896 + 0.3160 = 0.5056
0.5056 + 9.4800 = 9.9856
k = 64.03 / 3.16^2 = 64.03 / 9.9856 = 64.030 / 9.985
= 0 + 1 * 64030 / 9985
= 1 + 1 * 54045 / 9985
= 2 + 1 * 44060 / 9985
= 3 + 1 * 34075 / 9985
= 4 + 1 * 24090 / 9985
= 5 + 1 * 14105 / 9985
= 6 + 1 * 4120 / 9985
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 41200 / 9985
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 31215 / 9985
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 21230 / 9985
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 11245 / 9985
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 1260 / 9985
= 6.40 + 0.01 * 12600 / 9985
= 6.41 + 0.01 * 2615 / 9985
= 6.410 + 0.001 * 26150 / 9985
= 6.411 + 0.001 * 16165 / 9985
= 6.412 + 0.001 * 6180 / 9985
= 6.412

t = 1.33s, d = 11.34m:
t^2 = 1.33 * 1.33:
1.33 * 0.03 = 0.0399
1.33 * 0.30 = 0.3990
1.33 * 1.00 = 1.3300
0.0399 + 0.3990 = 0.4389
0.4389 + 1.3300 = 1.7689
k = 11.34 / 1.33^2 = 11.34 / 1.7689 = 11.340 / 1.768
= 0 + 1 * 11340 / 1768
= 1 + 1 * 9572 / 1768
= 2 + 1 * 7804 / 1768
= 3 + 1 * 6036 / 1768
= 4 + 1 * 4268 / 1768
= 5 + 1 * 2500 / 1768
= 6 + 1 * 732 / 1768
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 7320 / 1768
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 5552 / 1768
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 3784 / 1768
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 2016 / 1768
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 248 / 1768
= 6.40 + 0.01 * 2480 / 1768
= 6.41 + 0.01 * 712 / 1768
= 6.410 + 0.001 * 7120 / 1768
= 6.411 + 0.001 * 5352 / 1768
= 6.412 + 0.001 * 3584 / 1768
= 6.413 + 0.001 * 1816 / 1768
= 6.414 + 0.001 * 48 / 1768
= 6.414

k values: 6.412, 6.412, 6.414, 6.412, 6.414
k values (sorted): 6.412, 6.412, 6.412, 6.414, 6.414
The median k is 6.412.

For t = 4.63:
t^2 = 4.63 * 4.63:
4.63 * 0.03 = 0.1389
4.63 * 0.60 = 2.7780
4.63 * 4.00 = 18.5200
0.1389 + 2.7780 = 2.9169
2.9169 + 18.5200 = 21.4369
= 21.4369

d = 6.412 * 21.4369:
6.412 * 0.0009 = 0.0057708
6.412 * 0.0060 = 0.0384720
6.412 * 0.0300 = 0.1923600
6.412 * 0.4000 = 2.5648000
6.412 * 1.0000 = 6.4120000
6.412 * 20.0000 = 128.2400000
0.0057708 + 0.0384720 = 0.0442428
0.0442428 + 0.1923600 = 0.2366028
0.2366028 + 2.5648000 = 2.8014028
2.8014028 + 6.4120000 = 9.2134028
9.2134028 + 128.2400000 = 137.4534028
= 137.453

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{137.453}
